Sphinx Static Assets
====================

Place static documentation assets here.

Typical assets:
- custom CSS
- logos/icons
- downloadable reference files

Recommended Structure
---------------------
- ``css/`` for stylesheet overrides
- ``img/`` for logos and diagrams
- ``downloads/`` for supporting artifacts

Best Practices
--------------
- Keep filenames predictable and lowercase.
- Prefer optimized image formats to reduce page load time.
- Document custom CSS purpose so future changes remain maintainable.
